description:
The quiz assesses proficiency in Node.js I/O, covering fundamental file system tasks, buffer handling, encoding, and advanced streaming techniques, presented in an encouraging, instructional tone. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, suitable for developers looking to solidify practical Node I/O skills.
Topics: Node.js file system operations, Buffers and encoding, Stream APIs, Performance best practices
Audience: Intermediate JavaScript/Node.js developers seeking to deepen their understanding of I/O handling
